# github: contribution: calculate contrib to define better day for commits

**Motivation:** I have `.github` repo with +4 mirrors. So, one commit will be translate into 5.

```bash
$ git remote
mirror-octolab
mirror-octomation
mirror-octopot
mirror-tact
origin # git@github.com:kamilsk/.github.git
```
